commitMessage:
pip: add progress bar and foward/backward controls, fix #5711

Also fixed replacementRect when window is unlocked; cleaned up old code

Co-authored-by: prvrtl <29702518+prvrtl@users.noreply.github.com>

body.content:
let newVideoSize = videoView.frame.size.shrink(toSize: window.frame.size)
      pip.replacementRect = newVideoSize.centeredRect(in: .init(origin: .zero, size: window.frame.size))
